locations.name: City Center
locations.description: The hub of Torn City. George loiters by the fountain.

locations.name: Gym
locations.description: Train your Strength, Defense, Speed, and Dexterity here.

locations.name: Hospital
locations.description: Recover HP and revive fallen players. Morphine sold here.

locations.name: Drug Store
locations.description: Consumables, medical items, and the odd stimulant.

locations.name: Item Market
locations.description: Buy and sell weapons, armor, and goods. Prices shift with supply.

locations.name: Dark Alley
locations.description: A narrow backstreet. Street thugs patrol here. Crimes happen here.

locations.name: Police Station
locations.description: Officers patrol the entrance. Busting jailed players done here.

locations.name: Bank
locations.description: Deposit cash to protect it from mugging. Investment accounts available.
